title: eriastrum sapphirinum subsp. dasyanthum
intro: Eriastrum sapphirinum subsp. dasyanthum, also known as the Purple Owl's Clover or Dasyanthum Owl's Clover, is a perennial wildflower in the borage family native to California. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Eriastrum sapphirinum subsp. dasyanthum include its potential to soothe skin irritations and wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant may be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
